heroSection.title: Steel Doesn't Burn. Neither Should Your Home.
heroSection.subtitle: Custom homes and ADUs built with light-gauge steel framing, fire-resistant stucco, and Class A roofing - engineered for Southern California's wildfire country and installed in as fast as 90 days.
heroSection.backgroundImageAlt: Fire-resistant steel-framed custom home built by Fast Struct for California wildfire country

items.text: The temperature at which wood framing can ignite in a wildfire.
Light-gauge steel framing doesn't ignite - it can't feed a fire the way wood does.
The highest fire rating a roof can carry - the standard we spec for fire-country builds.

fireFacts.note: Material properties shown for general reference. Every project is engineered to site conditions and applicable California building codes, including Chapter 7A WUI requirements where they apply.

valueProp.title: Built From Materials That Won't Feed a Fire.
texts: Most homes in Southern California's wildfire zones are framed in wood - the same material fires consume. Fast Struct builds differently. Whether you're building a new home from the ground up or adding an ADU, the structure is light-gauge steel: non-combustible, dimensionally stable, and precision-cut to millimeter tolerances in our state-approved California facility.
Around that steel skeleton we build a fire-resistant envelope: a fire-resistant stucco exterior and Class A roofing - the materials fire-country building science calls for, engineered as one system.
Your lot, your design, your finishes - built for wildfire country.

image.alt: Light-gauge steel Smart Wall panels manufactured in Fast Struct's California facility

comparison.title: Wood Frame vs. Steel Frame
comparison.subtitle: In wildfire country, the materials your home is built from are the single biggest decision you'll make.

wood.title: Typical Wood-Framed Home
rows: Combustible structure - framing can ignite and carry fire
Standard siding and roofing can ignite from wind-blown embers
Vulnerable to rot, termites, and moisture over time
Months of on-site construction, noise, and disruption

steel.title: Fast Struct Steel Home
rows: Non-combustible light-gauge steel structure - it doesn't ignite or feed a fire
Fire-resistant stucco exterior and Class A roofing, engineered to resist ember attack
Immune to rot and termites; holds millimeter-level tolerances
Arrives up to 95% complete - installed in as fast as 90 days

companyOverview.title: Fast Struct: Steel Construction for California's Fire Country
texts: Fast Struct was built on a simple conviction: California homes should be faster to build and harder to destroy. So we moved construction into a state-approved factory and switched the structure to light-gauge steel.

As a licensed California contractor, we deliver complete A-Z solutions - design, permits, fabrication, and delivery - for custom homes and ADUs across the state, including Southern California's wildfire-prone communities and designated fire hazard severity zones.
From your first call to the day you get your keys, one dedicated project manager handles everything. We're not just a builder. We're your partner in building something that lasts.

items.title: Licensed CA Contractor
items.text: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured - every build compliant and warrantied.

items.title: State-Approved Facility
items.text: Our California factory routes plans through state approval for faster permits.

items.title: Complete A-Z Management
items.text: One dedicated project manager handles permits, design, fabrication, and delivery.

items.title: Steel - Built to Last
items.text: Non-combustible light-gauge steel that resists rot, termites, and time itself.

processTimeline.title: From First Call to Keys - As Fast As 90 Days.

steps.title: Lot & Risk Review
steps.description: We assess your lot, access, wildfire exposure, and goals - and recommend the right construction method for your parcel, whether it's a full home or an ADU.

steps.title: Design & Permits
steps.description: Your floor plan, your finishes. As a state-approved factory, our plans route through state approval - permits in days, not months. Builds in fire hazard zones are engineered to the Chapter 7A WUI requirements that apply to your parcel.

steps.title: Factory Build
steps.description: Your home is precision-built in light-gauge steel in our California facility while your foundation is prepared on-site. Parallel, not sequential - that's how the timeline compresses.

steps.title: One-Day Install
steps.description: Modules arrive up to 95% complete and are craned into place - rapid, clean, and quiet for your neighbors.

steps.title: Handover
steps.description: Walk into a finished home built from non-combustible materials. Keys in hand - not a punch list.

rebuild.title: If You've Lost a Home, Time Matters.
texts: Too many Southern California families have learned how long a conventional rebuild takes. Because your Fast Struct home is manufactured off-site while your lot is cleared and the foundation is prepared, the timeline compresses dramatically - and a dedicated project manager handles permits, approvals, and logistics from the first call to move-in.

bulletPoints.title: Factory-built off-site
bulletPoints.text: Your home takes shape in our facility while your property is being cleared.

bulletPoints.title: One dedicated project manager
bulletPoints.text: Permits, design, fabrication, and delivery - handled end to end.

bulletPoints.title: Fully custom design
bulletPoints.text: Rebuild the home you want, not a catalog box.

bulletPoints.title: Rebuilt in non-combustible materials
bulletPoints.text: Steel frame, fire-resistant stucco, Class A roof - so you never have to make this call twice.

differentiators.title: Why Fire-Country Homeowners Choose Fast Struct

items.title: Light-Gauge Steel - Not Wood
items.text: Every Fast Struct home is framed in light-gauge steel - our specialty. Steel is non-combustible, doesn't rot, and holds millimeter-level tolerances. It's a fundamentally better building material - and one that 90% of our competitors simply can't offer.

items.title: Fire-Resistant Stucco + Class A Roof
items.text: The envelope matters as much as the frame: a fire-resistant stucco exterior system and Class A roofing, engineered to resist the ember attack that ignites most homes in a wildfire.

items.title: As Fast As 90 Days
items.text: Off-site factory production runs in parallel with your on-site foundation work, compressing timelines no traditional builder can match.

items.title: State-Approved Facility = Faster Permits
items.text: As a state-certified modular factory, our plans go through the state approval route - permits in days, not months.

items.title: Homes and ADUs
items.text: From a full custom home on your lot to a backyard ADU, every project gets the same fire-smart materials and factory precision.

items.title: Arrives 95% Complete
items.text: Your home is craned onto your property nearly finished. Installation takes a day, not months.

items.title: Dedicated Project Manager
items.text: One person guides you personally from the first call to the day you're handed the keys.

items.title: Licensed CA Contractor + Certified Facility
items.text: Fully licensed, bonded, and compliant. Every build is warrantied and certified.

testimonials.quote: Fast Struct delivered our dream home in under 90 days. The quality is unreal. The steel construction feels so much more solid than wood.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: The whole process was seamless. One project manager, clear steps, no surprises. They handled our tight driveway with their panelized system.
testimonials.author: Jason T.

testimonials.quote: Our ADU was craned into place in a single day. The neighbors couldn't believe it. Highly professional and efficient team.
testimonials.author: Linda R.
